news.summary: Sense is expanding into the Japanese market through a new partnership to innovate smart meters with data capabilities of up to 1MHz. The goal is to enhance grid efficiency, safety, and reliability. Based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, the collaboration between Sense and Chugoku Keiki signifies a significant step towards modernizing energy infrastructure. The partnership aims to leverage advanced technology to shape a more sustainable and connected grid.
news.headline: Sense partners with CHK for Japan entry, developing smart meters with up to 1MHz data for grid efficiency.

news.summary: TimelyCare, a trusted virtual health and well-being provider in higher education, has introduced a new feature allowing instant phone connection with their providers without the need for logging in or using an app. This aims to enhance access to critical mental health support. The service was launched in Fort Worth, Texas on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: TimelyCare introduces 24/7 crisis line for instant mental health support without login or app. Based in Fort Worth, Texas.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in a particular region. The local health authorities confirmed a total of 500 new cases in the past week, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the area to 2,000. These new cases have raised concerns among officials about the potential for a surge in infections. The authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, including wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and washing hands frequently. Additionally, efforts are being made to enhance testing and contact tracing to better control the spread of the virus in the community. The situation is being closely monitored, and further updates will be provided as the situation evolves.
news.headline: Borregaard ASA issues commercial papers.

news.summary: The ITS Logistics US Port/Rail Ramp Freight Index forecast for April 2025 indicates continued frontloading through March, with strong import volumes expected in April. This trend is due to containers with frontloaded inventory reaching the U.S. by April 9th. Import and export volumes are expected to experience a "cliff event" in May and possibly into June, similar to the impacts felt during the immediate COVID response. This event will occur as excess frontloaded inventory is utilized and shippers delay sourcing efforts to minimize tariff cost impacts. Trucking capacity, container storage, terminal congestion, and chassis availability are expected to tighten as frontloaded inventory is absorbed into U.S. supply chains. Ports and ocean carriers not servicing export shippers are facing empty termination issues. CNBC reported a steep decline in new freight order activity across the U.S. and a quarterly decline in Chinese imports due to the frontloading trend.
news.headline: ITS Logistics predicts a potential drop in import and export volumes in the U.S. due to frontloading. Trucking capacity and terminal congestion expected to tighten as frontloaded inventory is absorbed. Cliff event similar to COVID response anticipated through May and June.

news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio, Quantum Health, a prominent consumer healthcare navigation and care coordination organization, received a Silver Stevie® Award for Front-Line Customer Service Team of the Year at the 19th annual Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service. This esteemed international accolade highlights outstanding performance in key business areas. Quantum Health gratefully acknowledges this recognition of its customer service team, known as He.
news.headline: Quantum Health's service team awarded Silver Stevie® for Customer Service Team of the Year at 19th Stevie Awards.

news.summary: The BCC Research study predicts that the Global DNA Sequencing market will grow from $14.8 billion in 2024 to $34.8 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 18.6% during the forecast period. The report delves into current and potential market trends, covering technologies like NGS, TGS, pyrosequencing, and Sanger sequencing. Segmented by product, end user, application, and disease category, the report also profiles major companies and analyzes their business segments. Geographically, North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Rest of the World are covered, focusing on personalized medicine's increasing demand. Factors driving market growth include technological advances, clinical diagnostics, precision medicine, and noninvasive prenatal testing.	getline_markupThe full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: DNA Sequencing industry to reach $34.8B by 2029, growing from $14.8B in 2024 at 18.6% CAGR. Focus on NGS, TGS, pyrosequencing, and Sanger sequencing. Market exploring personalized medicine, oncology, rare disease diagnosis, and prenatal testing. Geographical breakdown in North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and Rest of the World. Major companies and technological advances driving growth, includes clinical diagnostics, precision medicine, and NIPT. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Writer unveiled AI HQ, a centralized hub for enterprises to coordinate agent-powered work. This platform brings together IT and business users, providing tools to create, implement, and manage AI agents. The features include a low-code Agent Builder, advanced AI observability tools, and a library of 100 pre-made agents for various functions in finance, healthcare, retail, and technology sectors.
news.headline: Writer launches AI HQ: centralized hub with Agent Builder, observability tools. 100 agents available for tasks in finance, healthcare, retail.

news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J.-- NICE (Nasdaq: NICE) was acknowledged as a Leader in Contact Center as a Service by Forrester Research. In the Forrester Wave™: Contact-Center-As-A-Service (CCaaS) Platforms, Q2 2025 report, NICE was recognized as one of the top cloud contact center platforms. The NICE CXone Mpower platform offers extensive capabilities, including CCaaS, workforce management (WFM), and analytics, placing it among the leaders in the industry. This recognition highlights NICE's strength in the market.
news.headline: NICE named Leader in CCaaS by Forrester Research; CXone Mpower platform cited with broadest capability set.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Genesys®, a leading global cloud company specializing in AI-Powered Experience Orchestration, has been identified as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Contact-Center-As-A-Service (CCaaS) Platforms, Q2 2025. The renowned Genesys Cloud™ platform achieved the top score in the present offering segment and attained the highest possible scores in crucial aspects like AI architecture, generative AI (genAI) and large language model (LLM) support, and workforce management. This recognition highlights Genesys' strength in the field.
news.headline: Genesys named a leader in cloud contact center report by Forrester, with top scores in AI and workforce management.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - EarthDaily Analytics, a prominent player in Earth Observation data and analytics, debuted their EarthDaily Constellation on April 10, 2025. The innovative system harnesses broad-area change detection capabilities, providing unparalleled value to critical industries. EarthDaily's cutting-edge technology offers unmatched insights across various sectors, fueled by their expertise in EO data. The launch marks a significant advancement for the company, solidifying its position as a global frontrunner in the field.
news.headline: EarthDaily Analytics to launch its first satellite this summer, marking a major milestone in world's most advanced Earth observation change detection system. EarthDaily Constellation aims to deliver unmatched value across industries.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in West Palm Beach, Florida, Greenscreens.ai unveiled its latest offering, GS Intuition. This innovative pricing solution aims to improve long-term freight rate forecasting and maximize RFP bid strategies. Intuition is tailored to streamline contract bidding processes by offering precise insights. The tool is designed to optimize bid strategies, leading to improved efficiency in the transportation sector. This launch marks a significant step towards enhancing decision-making in the industry by providing cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: Greenscreens.ai introduces GS Intuition: AI-powered long-term freight pricing solution. Enhances rate forecasting and bidding strategies.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, incident.io, a comprehensive incident management platform relied upon by top engineering teams from companies such as Netflix, Linear, Ramp, and Etsy, has secured $62 million in Series B funding. The aim is to introduce an advanced AI-driven incident response system, setting a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: incident.io raises $62M in Series B funding to develop AI agents for incident resolution with elite engineering teams.

news.summary: In Hyderabad, India and Wessling, Germany on April 10, 2025, Cyient DLM, a leading company specializing in design-centered manufacturing, has strengthened its partnership with Deutsche Aircraft, a well-known regional aircraft manufacturer based in Germany. This expanded collaboration between the two companies will involve Cyient DLM working closely with Deutsche Aircraft on various projects.
news.headline: Cyient Group and Deutsche Aircraft expand partnership to collaborate on cabin management system for D328eco.

news.summary: SureForm 45 stapler by Intuitive now accessible for thoracic, colorectal, and urology procedures.
news.headline: FDA approves Intuitive's SureForm 45 stapler for single-port robotic surgery in thoracic, colorectal, urology procedures.

news.summary: CivicaScript®, LLC, a non-profit organization based in LEHI, Utah, has revealed that their generic droxidopa capsules showcase the benefits of their transparent and collaborative business approach. These capsules are estimated to cost approximately $2,100 less per month compared to the average cost for an individual with Medicare Part D. This announcement was made on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: CivicaScript® launches generic droxidopa capsules for neurogenic orthostatic hypotension, saving patients $2,100/month compared to average Medicare Part D cost.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Melville, New York, BioRestorative Therapies, Inc. (referred to as "BioRestorative", "BRTX" or the "Company") announced that it is not significantly impacted by the recently imposed U.S. tariffs. BioRestorative is a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BRTX, specializing in stem cell-based therapies and products in the clinical stage of development.
news.headline: BioRestorative unaffected by new US tariffs, all BRTX-100 production & manufacturing in US. No material impact.

news.summary: Announcing on April 10, 2025, in Knoxville, TN, Healthcare Integrated Technologies Inc. (OTC PINK: HITC), known for AI-driven safety solutions, appoints Anand Ijju as the new Chief Technology Officer. Mr. Ijju, renowned for scaling global tech ventures, boasts expertise in AI and enterprise systems. He will oversee the advancement of SafeSpace Global’s innovative ambient AI platform.
news.headline: Healthcare Integrated Technologies Inc. appoints Anand Ijju as new Chief Technology Officer, focusing on AI-driven solutions.

news.summary: With a valuation of $150 million, Wire Network is reinforcing its leadership team to support the development of a universal transaction layer tailored for the decentralized AI economy. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on April 10, 2025. This move comes after the introduction of MutAgents, AI-driven blockchain agents showcased at ETH Denver.
news.headline: Jaime Rogozinski joins Wire Network as CSO. Valued at $150M, Wire focuses on decentralized AI economy.

news.summary: In Albany, New York, on April 10, 2025, the New York StateWide Senior Action Council announced their "Medicare Fraud of the Month for April" initiative. Established for over five decades, the nonprofit organization focuses on addressing the requirements and welfare of seniors across the state.
news.headline: New York StateWide Senior Action Council exposes Medicare fraud, a 53-year-old organization.

news.summary: NextNRG has reported a significant increase in revenue for March 2025, with a growth of 161% compared to the same period last year. The first quarter of 2025 also saw substantial revenue growth of 146% when compared to the previous year. These strong financial results highlight the company's rapid expansion and success in the market.
news.headline: NextNRG's revenue grew by 161% YoY in March 2025 and 146% in Q1.

news.summary: A recent substantial order has solidified Silynxcom's standing as a reputable provider of cutting-edge tactical communication solutions. This sizable new order underscores the company's commitment to innovation and highlights its growing influence in the industry. The exact figures of the order remain undisclosed, but it is believed to be a substantial addition to Silynxcom's current portfolio. This development emphasizes the continued trust and reliance on Silynxcom for high-quality and advanced tactical communication systems.
news.headline: Silynxcom gets $1.1M order from Israel Defense Forces, boosting its role as a top tactical communication supplier.

news.summary: ERIE, Pa. - On April 10, 2025, FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) operating as Penelec in northern and central Pennsylvania, announced the installation of new poles and equipment to improve electric service reliability for almost 1,000 customers. This upgrade aims to enhance the overall service quality and efficiency in the region.
news.headline: Upgrade of electric system in NW Pennsylvania by FirstEnergy Penelec benefits nearly 1,000 customers with new poles and equipment to enhance service reliability.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on April 10, 2025, it was announced that funding will be provided to assist with home rebuilding, debris removal, mental health services, and other community needs following a disaster. The initiative includes grants of $25,000 awarded to 20 high-impact local nonprofits dedicated to long-term recovery efforts.
news.headline: Duke Energy donates $500,000 in grants to 20 local nonprofits in W. North Carolina for recovery efforts; $25,000 each awarded.

news.summary: A well-known ice cream brand has pinpointed the two most populated cities in Oklahoma as key markets for further expansion. Cold Stone Creamery® shared its intentions to grow its footprint in these areas during a recent announcement from Scottsdale, Arizona on April 10, 2025. This marks a strategic move for the company to capitalize on potential growth opportunities.
news.headline: Cold Stone Creamery plans to expand in Oklahoma City and Tulsa, citing them as prime markets for growth.

news.summary: In a major event held in Houston on April 10, 2025, a renowned yearly awards program honored companies and products leading innovation in the global clean technology sector. Among the recipients was Genesis Digital Assets Limited (GDA), a top player in the Bitcoin mining industry with impressive hash rate figures, cementing its position as one of the largest mining companies worldwide.
news.headline: GDA wins ESG Solution of the Year Award from CleanTech Breakthrough, as one of the top Bitcoin mining companies.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Shelton, Connecticut, Acme United Corporation (NYSE American: ACU) announced that it is set to unveil its financial outcomes for Q1 2025 on Thursday, April 17, 2025, at 9:00 AM ET.
news.headline: Acme United (NYSE: ACU) to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 17, 2025, at 9:00 AM Eastern Time.

news.summary: Aiper has recently announced a strategic partnership and a substantial investment totaling $100 million. This move is set to propel the company towards expansion and further establish its position as a key player in smart pool cleaning technology. By combining their unique strengths, the partnership aims to offer improved solutions to a wider range of customers. The announcement was made in Barcelona, Spain on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Aiper secures $100 million investment from Fluidra to expand globally in pool industry, enhancing smart pool cleaning tech.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in Marysville, Ohio, The Scotts Miracle-Gro Foundation and KidsGardening announced that they will be providing grants to 170 community-level programs as part of the GroMoreGood Grassroots Grant initiative. The goal of this initiative is to involve more children in gardens and outdoor activities, promoting a healthier lifestyle.
news.headline: 170 community programs receive grants from Scotts Miracle-Gro Foundation and KidsGardening to support children's access to gardens and outdoor play by 2025.

news.summary: In a statement released on April 10, 2025, NexGold Mining Corp. (TSXV: NEXG; OTCQX: NXGCF) shared updates on the progress of their 25,000-meter diamond drill initiative at the Goliath Gold Complex. The Company disclosed the outcomes of the latest drilling activities at two significant sites within the complex. These include the western section of the Goliath Deposit, referred to as "Goliath West," as well as the Far East Prospect, situated eight kilometers to the east of the Goliath Deposit.
news.headline: NexGold finds high-grade gold at Goliath West, extends mineralization at Far East Prospect in ongoing 25,000-metre drill program.

news.summary: In Edison, New Jersey, on April 10, 2025, Mike Tropeano, a Senior Vice President at Fi-Tek, commented on the evolving FinTech sector. He emphasized that the industry is undergoing significant changes as boundaries between different services blur. Intensifying competition and evolving client demands are key factors shaping the landscape. Tropeano stressed the crucial need for immediate action to adapt and thrive in this rapidly changing environment.
news.headline: Financial expert warns about changing FinTech industry, emphasizes need for action to stay relevant amid increasing competition.

news.summary: The article informs about the supplementation of draft resolutions for the upcoming Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of PST Group AB as per the Law on Companies of Lithuania. The meeting is scheduled for 11 April 2025 at P. Puzino Str. 1, Panevezys, starting at 10:00 with registration at 09:30. Only shareholders as of the record day on 4 April 2025, proxy holders, and those with transfer agreements can participate and vote. Shareholders holding at least 1/20 of all votes have requested the addition of new draft resolutions. This ensures transparency and shareholder engagement within the company's decision-making process.
news.headline: Draft resolutions for Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of PST Group AB supplemented by shareholders' request. Meeting on April 11, 2025, at P. Puzino Str. 1, Panevezys. Record day on April 4, 2025.

news.summary: Neonode Inc. (NASDAQ: NEON) revealed alterations in its Board of Directors as of April 10, 2025. Didier Schreiber will join the Board as a Class I Director, while Cecilia Edström will step down due to other commitments. The shake-up signifies a shift in the leadership structure of the company.
news.headline: Neonode (NASDAQ: NEON) appoints Didier Schreiber as Class I Director, announces changes in Board of Directors.

news.summary: In Lima, Peru on April 10, 2025, Minera IRL Limited, trading as BVL:MIRL and CSE:MIRL, issued a corporate announcement detailing efforts to finalize the 2024 audit and submit essential documents. The company expects to submit its annual consolidated financial statements, along with management’s discussion and analysis, annual information form, and necessary certifications collectively known as the “Annual Filings.”
news.headline: Minera IRL Limited facing Cease Trade Order for not filing annual reports, aims to complete 2024 audit.

news.summary: A highly skilled young American soccer player born between 2007 and 2008 has been offered a remarkable chance to apply for a fully funded 9-month training residency at a prestigious Bundesliga club in Germany. This opportunity allows the selected player to receive professional training at the renowned MÖNCHENGLADBACH, offering an exclusive insight into top-tier European soccer. This initiative, announced on April 10, 2025, is a tuition-free program that aims to nurture exceptional talent and provide a pathway for promising young athletes to develop their skills.
news.headline: First-ever full soccer scholarship for American youth player born in 2008-2007 by Borussia Mönchengladbach & International Soccer Academy in Germany, offering 9-month Bundesliga training residency.

Conducted by QKS Group, a renowned market intelligence and advisory firm, the latest comprehensive analysis of the global API Management Market sheds light on this upward trend. This forecast underscores the increasing importance and demand for API management solutions in various industries.
news.headline: API Management market projected to reach $20.28 billion by 2030, offering vendors a lucrative opportunity for growth.

news.summary: Marquette Bank has received an 'Outstanding' Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) rating from the Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago for the 12th consecutive time. This recognition highlights the bank's commitment to serving the community and meeting the credit needs of all individuals, including low- and moderate-income populations. The 'Outstanding' rating is a testament to Marquette Bank's efforts in providing valuable financial services and resources to the community, demonstrating its dedication to promoting economic development and financial inclusion.
news.headline: Marquette Bank receives 12th consecutive 'Outstanding' CRA rating from Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago.

news.summary: In Huntersville, North Carolina, on April 10, 2025, Microban International, a leading provider of antimicrobial solutions, received the silver Edison Award in the Materials Science category for their innovative antimicrobial technology Ascera™. This recognition was granted at a prestigious event...
news.headline: Microban International wins Silver Edison Award for Ascera™ antimicrobial technology, recognized in Materials Science category.
